train_command: uv run python -m harness.run_cascade --experiment-id s0_simba_resume --seed 1729 --config configs/s0_simba_resume.json
notes: Closes 6 train/serve format/source skews + eliminates flat-text training. (1) build_user_content dispatches on DEVELOPER:/AI: prefix → byte-equal LoRA/DSPy/inference wraps. (2) ProtocolSync writes SIMBA's program.json into engines/protocol.py before LoRA, so LoRA + eval + inference all read from one source. (3) SingleDigitAdapter.format wraps via build_user_content. (4) Phase 6 wraps every synthetic flat row in a real prior-context fragment harvested from production transcripts so training shape matches inference. (5) Re-extracted 51 real_transcript rows in proper bucket format. (6) Harvested 60 real bare-resume buckets from yasyf@yasyf production transcripts (48 train, 12 eval). LoRA: 400 iters, max_seq_length=2048, batch_size=4, grad_checkpoint=true. session_resume_tag_acc 0.8889 (shipped MIPRO avg) → 1.000 (this SIMBA, single seed) on the production failure mode.
prompt_campaign: DSPy SIMBA (num_candidates=6, max_steps=8) — single optimizer per user direction (better avg than MIPRO, ~30% cheaper)
